name: devenv
onCreateCommand: ( ( echo "\033[1;34m[setup] Starting miseOnCreateCommand.sh\033[0m" && ( cd . && printf '%s' "" | base64 -d | bash -euo pipefail && echo "\033[1;32m[setup] Finished miseOnCreateCommand.sh\033[0m" ) || (echo "\033[1;31m[setup] Errored! miseOnCreateCommand.sh\033[0m" && exit 1) )  &&  ( echo "\033[1;34m[setup] Starting scalaOnCreateCommand.sh\033[0m" && ( cd . && printf '%s' "" | base64 -d | bash -euo pipefail && echo "\033[1;32m[setup] Finished scalaOnCreateCommand.sh\033[0m" ) || (echo "\033[1;31m[setup] Errored! scalaOnCreateCommand.sh\033[0m" && exit 1) )) | sudo tee /var/log/on-create.log
postCreateCommand: ( ( echo "\033[1;34m[setup] Starting misePostCreateCommand.sh\033[0m" && ( cd . && printf '%s' "" | base64 -d | bash -euo pipefail && echo "\033[1;32m[setup] Finished misePostCreateCommand.sh\033[0m" ) || (echo "\033[1;31m[setup] Errored! misePostCreateCommand.sh\033[0m" && exit 1) )) | sudo tee /var/log/post-create.log
